title: Leidos Deploys Potable Water System to International Space Station

title: Leidos Announces Executive Leadership Team for 2024
text: New Executive Appointments Poised to Drive Innovation and Success RESTON, Va. , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Leidos, a global leader in technology solutions and services, today announced a realignment of its operating groups and changes to its corporate leadership structure and personnel, effective Jan. 1, 2024.
